name: ufc-tactical-dashboard
description: UFC Tactical Analysis Dashboard — SQLite API + Three.js 3D + biomechanics framework

_comments.better-auth: ESM-only from v1.6.9+. The better-auth/node adapter ships as .mjs and cannot be loaded via require() on Node.js v22+ (ERR_REQUIRE_ESM). server.js loads it via dynamic import() inside the async bootstrap. DO NOT downgrade below 1.6.9 or switch to require() without verifying a CJS build exists.
